intentSynonyms: look up investment news in fidelity
fetch a single investment news in fidelity
view one specific investment news in fidelity
news for your portfolio holdings in fidelity
description: Get recent news articles related to specific ticker symbols in your portfolio. Returns headlines with source and date.

symbols.description: Ticker symbols to get news for (e.g., ["AAPL", "VOO"])

count.description: Number of articles to return (default 20, max 50)
